title: What's New With VISs | Vaccines & Immunizations | CDC
text:

2023 
December 7, 2023 
New Tick-borne Encephalitis (TBE) Vaccine VIS Now Available 
A new Vaccine Information Statement for TBE vaccine has been posted. We encourage providers to begin using this VIS immediately.
October 19, 2023 
New COVID-19 and Updated Respiratory Syncytial Virus (RSV) Vaccine VISs Now Available 
A new Vaccine Information Statement for COVID-19 vaccine and an updated VIS for RSV vaccine have been posted. We encourage providers to begin using these VISs immediately, but stocks of previous editions may be used until exhausted.
July 24, 2023 
New Respiratory Syncytial Virus (RSV) and Updated Multiple Vaccines (“Your Child’s First Vaccines”) VISs Now Available 
A new Vaccine Information Statement for respiratory syncytial virus vaccine and an updated VIS for multiple vaccines have been posted. We encourage providers to begin using these VISs immediately, but stocks of previous editions may be used until exhausted.
May 12, 2023 
Updated Pneumococcal Conjugate and Hepatitis B VISs Now Available 
Updated VISs for pneumococcal conjugate and hepatitis B vaccines have been posted. Providers are encouraged to begin using these updated VISs immediately, but stocks of the previous editions may be used until exhausted.
2022 
November 16, 2022 
Updated Smallpox/Monkeypox VIS Now Available
